examples: OBJECTIVE To extract the sphingomyelin from erythrocyte membrane and hydrolyze it to ceramide.
Lysozymes can hydrolyze bacteria and play an important role in animal digestion and innate immunity.
Digestive enzymes do not hydrolyze them significantly; nevertheless, they may be quite important for human health.
The function of this enzyme is to hydrolyze triglycerides into free fatty acids, an essential step in the metabolism of fats from consumed food.
